contract_summary: This wrapper acquires a reference-counted batadv_hard_iface pointer by extracting a hard interface index from a netlink message and delegating to the internal get function. The caller receives a pointer with an elevated refcount and must release it via batadv_hardif_put when done. The function returns an ERR_PTR on error (missing attribute or invalid ifindex). The operation is conditional on the attribute being present; no retry logic is needed as the input is static.
